title: 1000 Cater Wipes - Sani Care Bulk Hospitality Cleaning Wipes - Perfect for Restaurants, Catering & Hotels
features: A bucket containing 1000 premium wipes to ensure your catering and hospitality spaces maintain the highest standards of sanitising cleanliness and safety with Sani Care Cater Wipes.
Each wipe is infused with a powerful, fast-acting sanitising solution that effectively eliminates germs, bacteria, and viruses.
Our non-toxic wipes leave no residue or unpleasant odours, making them perfect for all your surface cleaning needs.
Designed to be safe for use in food preparation areas and suitable for all types of surfaces and materials.
Ideal for restaurants, hotels, cafés, kitchen's and catering events seeking reliable and efficient sanitising solutions.
Includes 1000 Wipes in a convenient and portable packaging allows for effortless, on-the-go cleaning whenever and wherever it's needed.
Protect your guests and employees by preventing the spread of harmful pathogens with Sani Care Cater Wipes.
Help save our future! Use 100% recyclable Sani Care Swipe wipes - upcycled and re-purposed after use.
